objective: Propagate operator notification and Remote MCP SSOT keys from the gitignored governance vault into generated local-ai-machine env files without executing vault values.
scope_boundary: Modify the governance env bootstrap, ENV registry, issue #416 planning/validation/closeout artifacts, and focused contract tests.
Regenerate local-ai-machine .env only as an ignored local artifact after code validation.
Do not commit .env.shared, generated .env files, phone numbers, token values, JWTs, HMAC keys, or Cloudflare Access secrets.
out_of_scope: Implementing a new Slack or SMS send adapter.
Changing Remote MCP bridge runtime code.
Rotating existing Twilio, Slack, Cloudflare, or Remote MCP secrets.
Editing unrelated sibling worktrees or repos beyond the generated local-ai-machine .env artifact.
research_summary: Repository docs designate hldpro-governance/.env.shared as the gitignored SSOT vault and generated repo-local env files as artifacts. The prior lam bootstrap did not propagate operator notification keys and shell-sourced .env.shared, which can execute command-string values.

sprints.name: LAM notification SSOT bootstrap
sprints.goal: Make local-ai-machine env generation consume operator notification SSOT keys safely and completely.
tasks: Update bootstrap vault loading to parse .env.shared as data and export shell-safe values.
Emit Remote MCP and operator notification keys from the lam target with optional defaults where appropriate.
Document the new local-ai-machine key mappings in the env registry.
Add a static contract test for safe parsing and required key propagation.
Validate dry-run output and regenerated local-ai-machine .env without printing values.
Open PR, merge after checks pass, and close issue #416.
acceptance_criteria: The bootstrap script no longer contains `source "$SHARED_ENV"` or equivalent shell execution of the vault.
The lam target emits Remote MCP, Cloudflare Access service token, operator inbound queue, Slack routing, Twilio provider, and operator SMS destination keys.
Missing optional notification keys do not produce `set -u` failures.
ENV registry documents the propagated local-ai-machine keys.
Validation proves required key names are present without printing values.
No vault values or generated env files are committed.
Closed-issue backlog drift surfaced by final CI is reconciled without reopening or editing unrelated issue scope.
Final AC: GitHub PR checks pass before closeout.

specialist_reviews.focus: Confirm .env.shared is parsed as data and LAM notification keys are emitted without committing or printing secret values.
specialist_reviews.summary: Accepted a scoped bootstrap and registry change with no runtime bridge modifications and no committed local vault artifacts.

alternate_model_review.summary: Fresh QA review is requested for the final diff and validation set; local acceptance is conditioned on no findings or resolved findings.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #416 may update the governance env bootstrap, ENV registry, focused tests, and issue planning/validation/closeout artifacts; generated local-ai-machine env is local-only.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Validate the bootstrap contract, regenerate local-ai-machine env as an ignored artifact, open PR, merge after checks pass, and close issue #416.

material_deviation_rules: If any command output or artifact contains vault values, remove or redact it before commit and rerun validation.
If Slack or SMS source credentials are absent from .env.shared, keep generated keys empty and route provider setup to a follow-up issue.
If the change requires local-ai-machine runtime code edits, stop and create a separate LAM issue/lane.
